creator: snb@threerings.net
text:
Actually, I am the maintainer. splat@dpw.threerings.net is a mailing  
list. I originally submitted the port (see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ 
query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/99287) with this mailing list as MAINTAINER,  
which probably wasn't the best idea. This patch sets it to my own  
email address, along with updating to the new release.
